name: punchwall-depth-corridor
description: Validate the deep corridor layout, sequential gates, depth score progression, passable destruction hole, and rank HUD.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local corridor=root.Polish:FindFirstChild("Depth Corridor") local tier=root.Polish["Wall Tier Frames"] local walls={} for _,w in ipairs(root.Walls:GetChildren()) do local depth=w:GetAttribute("Depth") if depth and depth<=10 then table.insert(walls,{depth=depth,z=w.Position.Z,required=w:GetAttribute("RequiredDepth"),level=w:GetAttribute("RequiredLevel"),size=w.Size}) end end table.sort(walls,function(a,b)return a.depth<b.depth end) local ordered=#walls==10 local uniform=true local buildingMass=false for i,item in ipairs(walls) do ordered=ordered and item.depth==i and item.required==i-1 and (i==1 or item.z<walls[i-1].z) uniform=uniform and (item.size-Vector3.new(28,11,3.2)).Magnitude<0.01 and (i==1 or math.abs((walls[i-1].z-item.z)-30)<0.01) buildingMass=buildingMass or tier:FindFirstChild(({"Brick Wall","Concrete Wall","Iron Wall","Crystal Wall","Lava Wall","Cyber Gate","Titan Alloy Gate","Meteor Core Gate","Void Crystal Gate","Omega Barrier"})[i].." Rear Building Mass")~=nil end local markers,lights=0,0 for _,d in ipairs(corridor:GetDescendants()) do if d:GetAttribute("VisualRole")=="DepthRoadsideMarker" then markers+=1 elseif d:GetAttribute("VisualRole")=="DepthGuideLight" then lights+=1 end end local left=corridor:FindFirstChild("Depth Corridor Side -21") local right=corridor:FindFirstChild("Depth Corridor Side 17") return H:JSONEncode({walls=#walls,ordered=ordered,uniform=uniform,floor=corridor:FindFirstChild("Depth Corridor Floor")~=nil,boundaries=left~=nil and right~=nil,curbsLow=left and right and math.abs(left.Size.Y-1.2)<0.01 and math.abs(right.Size.Y-1.2)<0.01,noBuildingMass=not buildingMass,markers=markers,lights=lights,lastZ=walls[#walls] and walls[#walls].z})

steps.label: corridor has ten ordered depth gates

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage:WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation") c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{WallLevel=3,Depth=0,Power=1000}) return H:JSONEncode(c:Invoke("HitWall","Concrete Wall"))

local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("SetStats",{WallLevel=1,Depth=0,Score=0,Power=500,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local r=c:Invoke("BreakWall","Brick Wall",2) local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local w=root.Walls["Brick Wall"] local hidden,solid=0,0 for _,d in ipairs(root.Polish["Wall Tier Frames"]:GetDescendants()) do if d:GetAttribute("PolishRole")=="ModularDestructionBrick" and string.find(d.Name,"Brick Wall",1,true) then if d.Transparency>=0.9 and not d.CanCollide then hidden+=1 else solid+=1 end end end local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(-2,4,w.Position.Z-8) return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,broken=w:GetAttribute("Broken"),depth=r.Depth,score=r.Score,wallPassable=not w.CanCollide,hidden=hidden,solid=solid,playerZ=math.floor(p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Z+.5)})

steps.label: brick break opens a mixed rubble hole and advances depth

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("SetStats",{WallLevel=3,Depth=1,Power=2000,CritChance=0}) local r=c:Invoke("BreakWall","Concrete Wall",2) return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,depth=r.Depth,score=r.Score})

steps.label: second wall advances cumulative score and depth
rank and server placement are visible in HUD
